title: Graeme Horne
description: England & Scotland international rugby league footballer
extract:
Graeme Horne (born 22 March 1985) is an English former rugby league footballer who last played as a second-row forward for the Doncaster R.L.F.C. in the Championship. He retired at the end of the 2020 season.
He previously played for Hull FC, Huddersfield Giants and Hull Kingston Rovers.
